title: OKR planning from vision statements
use_when: OKR planning from vision statements. Use when the user needs a product workflow for product strategy related to okr planning from vision statements. Trigger terms: okrs, strategy, goal-setting, product-management, execution, prioritization.
do_not_use_when: Do not use OKR planning from vision statements when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: OKR planning from vision statements strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
framework_fit: OKR planning from vision statements fits Strategy work in the Strategize lifecycle when the user needs OKR planning from vision statements strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces OKR planning from vision statements strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move without tying recommendations to the user's Strategize stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats OKR planning from vision statements as generic Strategy advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from OKR planning from vision statements when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $okr-planning-from-vision-statements to turn this okr context into a decision-ready OKR planning from vision statements strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move.
examples.expected_artifact: OKR planning from vision statements strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
